name: The Reckoning
description: The character relives the moment they failed — the debt they carry. They can change the outcome, but only by accepting a new wound.
hopePole: The Reckoning — face the debt honestly, pay the price, close the chapter.
tollPole: The Erasure — destroy the evidence, silence the witnesses, bury the debt.
setup: [PLACEHOLDER] You're back there. The place where it happened. The moment that broke something inside you. Everything is exactly as you remember — except this time, you can see the choice you didn't make.

rounds.prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] The person you wronged stands before you. They remember. They've been carrying your debt as long as you have. They ask one question: why?

choices.label: Tell them the truth — all of it
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] The words are harder than any fight. But you say them. The truth hangs in the air between you like a blade.

choices.label: Tell them what they want to hear
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You craft an answer that sounds like honesty. Their face softens. The lie tastes like ash.

choices.label: Say nothing — let the silence speak
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You hold their gaze. The silence stretches. Sometimes there are no words that fit the wound.

rounds.prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] The vision shifts. You see the consequences of what you did — the chain of events, the people it touched, the damage that rippled outward. You can trace every thread back to your hands.

choices.label: Follow each thread — own every consequence
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You walk the damage path. Every face. Every cost. You don't look away.

choices.label: Cut the threads — some of this wasn't my fault
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You sever the connections you can. Some of these consequences were inevitable. You just accelerated them.

choices.label: Acknowledge the chain but focus on what I can fix now
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You can't undo the past. But you can choose where the chain ends.

rounds.prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] The final moment. The debt stands before you, given form. Paying it will cost you something real — something you can't get back. But the chapter will close. Or you can walk away and carry it forever.

choices.label: I pay. Close the chapter.
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] The price is steep. Something inside you breaks — but something else heals. The chapter closes.

choices.label: Destroy the debt — erase it from existence
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You tear the debt apart. The evidence scatters. The witnesses forget. The chapter doesn't close — it simply ceases to exist.

choices.label: Make a partial payment — enough to live with
choices.narration: [PLACEHOLDER] You give what you can. It's not enough to close the chapter, but it's enough to turn the page.

resolutions.light: [PLACEHOLDER] You emerge from the Hall lighter. The debt is settled. The wound remains, but it's clean now — healing instead of festering. You faced what you did and chose to pay.
resolutions.dark: [PLACEHOLDER] You emerge from the Hall unburdened. The debt is gone — not paid, but destroyed. No one remembers. No one can prove it. The Dark Side Nexus approves of your efficiency.
resolutions.neutral: [PLACEHOLDER] You emerge from the Hall carrying less weight but not weightless. You paid what you could. The rest follows you like a shadow — present but not paralyzing.
